description: '''Sigilkore''' is an [[Internet rap|Internet]] [[microgenre]] of [[trap music]] characterized by layered [[Remix|DJ mixing]] and digital effects such as [[bitcrushing]] and [[pitch shifting]] with lyrics relating to  [[Magic (supernatural)|magic]], [[deities]], [[Demon|demons]] and [[Occult ritual|occult rituals]]. It originally emerged in 2019 as a mixing style pioneered by American rappers [[Luci4]] and [[Islurwhenitalk]] who founded the collective Jewelxxet. Luci4 would be a member of [[SpaceGhostPurrp]]'s collective [[SpaceGhostPurrp|BMB Deathrow]].
